label: exam

ocr_findings.ocr_says: ア. 共有サーバにアクセスし、ソフトウェアパッケージを無断で違法コピーする。

ocr_findings.note: OCR uses half-width period 'ア.' after choice marker; output normalizes to full-width period 'ア．'. Same pattern for all choices across all 5 questions. This is consistent normalization, not a fidelity defect. Content is identical.

narrative: Page 087 has 5 exam questions. All JP stem and choice text matches OCR faithfully (minor half-width to full-width period normalization is consistent and acceptable). All answer_indices verified against the OCR answer key line ('問題2-7 イ=1, 問題2-8 ア=0, 問題2-9 ウ=2, 問題2-10 エ=3, 問題2-11 エ=3') — all correct. Choice markers ア/イ/ウ/エ correctly retained in JP field.
